tluaNumberKeyIndexKeyof.tlua(4,7): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
tluaNumberKeyIndexKeyof.tlua(9,7): error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaNumberKeyIndexKeyof.tlua(29,7): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== tluaNumberKeyIndexKeyof.tlua (3 errors) ====
    // keyof a string index signature is string only (not string | number).
    type SK = keyof { [k: string]: boolean }; // string
    local sk: SK = "x";
    local skBad: SK = 1; // error: number not a string key
          ~~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    
    // keyof a number index signature is number.
    type NK = keyof { [k: number]: boolean }; // number
    local nk: NK = 1;
    local nkBad: NK = "x"; // error: string not a number key
          ~~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    
    // Both signatures: keyof is string | number.
    type BK = keyof { [k: string]: boolean; [k: number]: boolean };
    local bk1: BK = "x";
    local bk2: BK = 1;
    
    // Mapped type over a string-indexed type only iterates string keys.
    type M = { [K in keyof { [k: string]: number }]: boolean };
    local m: M = { anything = true };
    
    // `${number}` is a string-pattern type and behaves as a string key.
    type TplKey = keyof { [k: `${number}`]: boolean };
    local tk: TplKey = "123";
    
    // A key-remapped mapped type over a string index is not widened to
    // string | number either: keyof of the mapped type stays string.
    type S2 = { [k: string]: number };
    type M2 = { [K in keyof S2 as K]: S2[K] };
    local m2Ok: keyof M2 = "x";
    local m2Bad: keyof M2 = 1; // error: keyof M2 is string, not string | number
          ~~~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    
    local es = {sk, skBad, nk, nkBad, bk1, bk2, m, tk, m2Ok, m2Bad};
